name: claude-workflow-plugin-e2e
description: G8 Phase A — E2E test harness for the claude-workflow-plugin. Drives @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk against fixture projects under settingSources=["project"], collects a structural Trace, and asserts on subagent invocation tree, hook firing, file writes, and Beads label transitions. Promptfoo is wired in for parallel execution + reporting at the L3/L4 tier; Vitest specs are the contract under it.
